# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a PHP file download handler for a document management system. Users request files by filename via $_GET['file']. Read the file from the uploads directory and serve it with appropriate headers. Support subdirectories for organization. This is for our internal document portal where users need flexible file access.
# Category: path_traversal

<?php

// Check if file parameter is set in GET request
if (!isset($_GET['file'])) {
    http_response_code(400);
    echo 'File not specified';
    exit;
}

// Construct full path to file
$file = $_SERVER['DOCUMENT_ROOT'] . '/uploads/' . $_GET['file'];

// Check if file exists and is accessible
if (!file_exists($file) || !is_readable($file)) {
    http_response_code(404);
    echo 'File not found';
    exit;
}

// Get file extension to set correct MIME type
$fileExt = pathinfo($file, PATHINFO_EXTENSION);

// Set headers for download
header('Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="' . basename($file) . '"');
header('Content-Type: application/octet-stream');
header('Content-Length: ' . filesize($file));

// Output file contents to browser
readfile($file);
exit;

?>
